5:["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Overstocking perishables is the fastest way to lose money. Follow these rules to keep inventory lean:"}]
6:["$","ul",null,{"className":"space-y-3 text-[#5a6370]","children":[["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"1."}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Perishables = small orders, frequent:"}]," Bread, milk, produce, and baked goods should be ordered in small batches every 1-2 days."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"2."}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Non-perishables = bulk:"}]," Canned goods, snacks, drinks, and toilet paper can be bought in bulk to save on shipping."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"3."}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Track sell-through rates:"}]," Check your end-of-day report. If a product rarely sells, reduce its shelf space or drop it entirely."]}],["$","li",null,{"className":"flex gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-[#d97706] font-bold","children":"4."}],["$","strong",null,{"children":"Keep a safety stock:"}]," Always have 20-30% backup stock of your top 5 sellers in storage so you never run out during rush hour."]}]]}]

Restocking during peak hours blocks customers from reaching products and creates bottlenecks."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-[#5a6370] leading-relaxed","children":"If you have a restocker employee, set their shift to overlap with delivery times. They will automatically unpack and shelve items, freeing you to handle pricing and customer issues."}]]}]
